heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 87–353, § 3(a)75 Stat. 773Oct. 4, 1961
label: 1020b, 1020c Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 87–353, § 3(a)75 Stat. 773Oct. 4, 1961
notes: Section 1020b, acts , ; , ; , ; , , prescribed the capital of the Federal Farm Mortgage Corporation to be in the sum of $200,000,000 and provided for subscription by the United States and repayment by the Corporation.Jan. 31, 1934, ch. 7, § 348 Stat. 345June 25, 1940, ch. 427, § 454 Stat. 573June 30, 1945, ch. 204, § 1459 Stat. 269July 12, 1946, ch. 570, § 260 Stat. 532

Section 1020c, acts , ; , , authorized the issuance of bonds not exceeding $2,000,000,000 at any one time and provided for purchase and sale by United States and exchange of such bonds for consolidated farm loan bonds.Jan. 31, 1934, ch. 7, § 4(a)48 Stat. 345Apr. 27, 1934, ch. 168, § 1448 Stat. 647
